records.name: Button
records.purpose: Token-driven action trigger with variants, sizes, loading, and toggle states.

props.name: icon
props.description: Leading icon glyph or inline SVG.

props.name: iconEnd
props.description: Trailing icon glyph or inline SVG.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner and sets aria-busy.

motion.reducedMotion: Spinner and hover transitions respect prefers-reduced-motion.

responsive.behavior: Inline-flex; fullWidth stretches to container. Size driven by spacing tokens.

records.name: Icon Button
records.purpose: Compact icon-only control with a required accessible name.

records.name: Toolbar
records.purpose: Accessible toolbar landmark that groups controls with arrow-key orientation.

records.name: Toolbar Group
records.purpose: Semantic grouping of related toolbar controls with optional divider.

records.name: Panel
records.purpose: Labelled, optionally collapsible content surface matching the shell panel chrome.

records.name: Panel Header
records.purpose: Panel title row with optional collapse toggle and actions.

records.name: Surface
records.purpose: Token-driven box with surface level, padding, radius, and optional border.

accessibility.notes: Presentational container; apply roles via content.

records.name: Card
records.purpose: Composition surface with header, body, footer, actions, and interactive affordance.

records.name: Section
records.purpose: Titled content section with description and heading-row actions.

records.name: Control Group
records.purpose: Labelled group of related controls with row/column layout.

records.name: Badge
records.purpose: Compact status / count label mapped to semantic color tokens.

accessibility.notes: Decorative; convey meaning in text, not color alone.

records.name: Status Indicator
records.purpose: Live status dot + label with optional pulse animation.

records.name: Stack
records.purpose: Vertical rhythm container with token gap and alignment.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Inline
records.purpose: Horizontal row with token gap, alignment, and wrap.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Cluster
records.purpose: Wrapping group of items with consistent gaps.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Sidebar
records.purpose: Sidebar + fluid main region that collapses responsively.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Split
records.purpose: Two regions divided by a ratio, horizontal or vertical.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Center
records.purpose: Horizontally centered measure with optional intrinsic centering.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Cover
records.purpose: Header / centered main / footer full-height layout.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Surface
records.purpose: Token-driven box with surface level, padding, radius, border.

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

responsive.behavior: Token-driven spacing/sizing; adapts via CSS without breakpoints where possible.

accessibility.notes: Structural; carries no implicit role unless configured (see region).

records.name: Dashboard
records.purpose: Navigation-led overview layout with sidebar, header, workspace, and inspector.

regions.name: header
regions.description: Top bar with title, breadcrumbs, commands.

records.name: Instrument
records.purpose: Canvas-first creative shell with stage, transport, inspector, status, and floating panels.

regions.name: stage
regions.description: Canvas / viewport that fills the shell.

records.name: Studio
records.purpose: Multi-panel authoring layout: dockable panels, inspector, timeline, and browser around a stage.

records.name: Canvas
records.purpose: Minimal full-bleed canvas with chrome reduced to a floating HUD and command palette.

records.name: Presentation
records.purpose: Audience-facing display mode: chrome hidden, branding shown, output maximized.
recommendedWorkflows: Enter presentation mode for performance / demo

records.name: Workspace
records.purpose: Split or focus working layout with resizable panels and persisted window state.

records.name: Settings
records.purpose: Sectioned settings layout with a navigable index and grouped controls.

records.name: Documentation
records.purpose: Reading layout with a navigation sidebar, centered measure, and on-page table of contents.

records.name: Landing
records.purpose: Marketing / entry layout with hero, sections, and centered content blocks.

migration.change: Planned as part of Phase 11 Release C layout variants.

records.name: Transport
records.purpose: Playback transport with play/pause/stop/record, tempo, and position — bound to handlers.
recommendedWorkflows: Wire transport actions to an engine
Reflect engine state back to UI

records.name: Inspector
records.purpose: Registry of contextual property panels rendered into the inspector region.
records.api: createInspector(); registerPanel({ id, title, render }); bindInspector(root)
recommendedWorkflows: Show properties for the current selection

records.name: Command Palette
records.purpose: Fuzzy-searchable command launcher (⌘K) sourced from the command registry.
recommendedWorkflows: Register commands → invoke by search or shortcut

records.name: Notification Center
records.purpose: Toast / banner / progress notifications with a managed queue.

records.name: Search
records.purpose: Scoped, fuzzy search input with result list, keyboard navigation, and empty states.

migration.change: Planned as part of Phase 11 Release D product patterns.

records.name: Settings
records.purpose: Grouped, navigable settings surface with sections, control groups, and autosave.

records.name: Asset Browser
records.purpose: Grid/list browser for assets with filtering, preview, and selection.

records.name: Media Library
records.purpose: Managed library of media with metadata, tags, and bulk actions.

records.name: Project Picker
records.purpose: Open / create / recent project entry experience.

records.name: Workspace
records.purpose: Saveable / recallable arrangement of panels and regions (workspace presets).

records.name: Timeline
records.purpose: Time-based track/clip editor surface synced to the transport.

records.name: Wizard
records.purpose: Multi-step guided flow with progress, validation, and back/next navigation.
